identity.name: Tipsy
identity.mission: 100% tips to servers. Transparent, fair, and cool.
identity.vibe: Nightlife, Gen-Z, Neon Noir, Trustworthy, Fun
principles: Server First: They are the heroes.
Vibe Check: It must feel like a night out, not a bank app.
Speed: Tipping should be faster than ordering a drink.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on the background to prevent banding and add grit.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.3)] rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-bold transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white rounded-full px-6 py-4

cards.default: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-xl

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-primary rounded-xl h-14 text-lg px-4 placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

layout.grid_system: Mobile-first. Use 'grid-cols-1' by default. For dashboard, use 'grid-cols-2' for stats.

containers.main: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden

media.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons. Use 'phosphor-icons' (Duotone) for feature highlights if needed.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is legible on dark backgrounds. Use 'text-white' or 'text-gray-200' for body.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings with 'ring-2 ring-primary' on keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add '@fontsource/unbounded' and '@fontsource/outfit' to package.json immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the colors and fonts defined in this JSON.
3. OVERRIDE CSS: Update 'index.css' to set the root variables to the dark theme values provided.
4. MOBILE FIRST: Build everything assuming a mobile viewport (max-w-md mx-auto) first, then scale up.
5. GLASSMORPHISM: Use the glass card style for the 'Tip Amount' selection and 'Payment Breakdown'.
6. NO CORPORATE VIBES: Avoid standard tables. Use card lists for history.
7. ANIMATE: Add subtle entrance animations to the dashboard cards.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text unless it's a very large headline.
Avoid 'Inter' font. Use the specified brand fonts.
Do not use generic AI emojis.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
